title: Fix .npmrc scope config and other devDep hygiene
description: .npmrc:1-2 configures GitHub Packages registry for @jango-blockchained scope. This may break `npm install` for npm users. Either remove .npmrc or restrict to a specific workflow. Also check for: misplaced types (e.g. @types/express v5 with express v4), outdated devDeps (eslint v8, @typescript-eslint v7).
validation: Read .npmrc. Either remove it or make it opt-in. Fix @types/express to ^4.17.x. (Outdated eslint/typescript-eslint can be a separate task; recommend keeping current versions to avoid scope creep.)
